decisions.rationale: Simpler Pascal scripting, first-class per-user install mode, built-in AUMID shortcut properties (D-01)
Qt-native, cross-platform, raises existing window for free (D-08/D-09)

decisions.decision: Node.js check = soft warning dialog + continue; surfaces in 3 places (startup dialog + toast at YT play time + hamburger menu indicator)
decisions.rationale: Three-pronged UX ensures prerequisite is impossible to miss without blocking non-YT users (D-11..D-14)

decisions.decision: DI.fm HTTPS = server-side issue, no code workaround
decisions.rationale: SomaFM proves TLS stack works; DI.fm servers reject HTTPS post-handshake (D-15)

decisions.decision: Broad-collect all 184 GStreamer plugins (~110 MB bundle)
decisions.rationale: Phase 43 proved this config works; risk of pruning-induced breakage > size savings (D-16)

decisions.decision: Start Menu shortcut only (no Desktop, no Taskbar pin)
decisions.rationale: Start Menu carries AUMID; Pin-to-Taskbar is fragile and user can pin manually (user explicit revision)
